name: 13oz Stoneware FAVORITE CHILD Camper Mug - Room Essentials™
description:
Make your adventures extra fun with this Camper Mug from Room Essentials™. Made of stoneware material, this camper mug is designed in green hue from inside and features "Favorite Child" text on a white backdrop. Designed with a capacity of 13 fluid ounces, this mug is suitable for various cold and hot beverages. Plus, it's dishwasher safe for easy cleaning.


Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
